scope: Strict TC4 parity batch for Warded/Essentia Jars, Arcane Alembic, Alchemical Furnace distillation path, Essentia Tubes, labels, active original assets and duplicate recipe cleanup.
rule: No new mechanics or new survival items were added. Existing core blocks were moved closer to original Thaumcraft 4 behavior and assets.

details: Added TC4DistillationRuntime adapter: furnace essentia now drains into alembics stacked above the furnace every 5 ticks, one essentia at a time.
Essentia Tubes no longer pull directly from Alchemical Furnace block entities; alembics are the transport source, matching TC4's furnace -> alembic -> tube/jar flow.
Alembic keeps TC4-style Aspect/Amount/facing NBT compatibility alongside modern AspectList sync data.
Removed the non-original blaze-powder/crucible click-distillation branch from AlembicBlock behavior.
EssentiaJarBlockEntity now persists labelFacing through original facing NBT and keeps AspectFilter/Aspect/Amount compatibility keys.
Jar labels store the clicked horizontal side and renderer uses that side instead of always placing the label on north face.
Existing jar fill capacity remains 64 and void jar overflow remains voiding overflow, not fake storage.
Tube transport endpoints are now tube/jar/alembic, not furnace.
Resolver mapping for blockTube:0/1/4 now points to active essentia_tube/essentia_valve/essentia_tube_filter instead of tc4_* mirror placeholders.
Active tube models use original TC4 pipe_1, pipe_2, pipe_filter, pipe_filter_core, pipe_oneway, pipe_restrict, pipe_buffer and pipe_valve textures.
Copied original TC4 alembic.obj, alembic.mtl, alembic.png, jar.png, jar_void.png, label.png and pipe textures into active resource paths.
Alembic block model is no longer cube_all; it now has an approximate TC4 silhouette adapter using the original alembic texture.
Essentia valve active block model uses original pipe_valve texture.
Removed duplicate essentia_jar_original_style.json and alembic_original_style.json survival recipes.
Kept a single cleaned essentia_jar.json and alembic.json recipe path.
Replaced invalid 1.7.10 wooden_slab item id with 1.19.2 wooden slab tag adapter while preserving the original recipe intent.
Connected new audit into GitHub Actions static-audit job.
Audit blocks regressions to direct furnace tube extraction, duplicate recipes, cube_all alembic placeholder, and missing original pipe/jar/alembic assets.

known_remaining_non_parity: Alembic geometry is still a 1.19.2 JSON silhouette adapter, not a full OBJ baked model renderer.
Jar and tube visual geometry still needs deeper pixel/UV parity with TC4 TileJar/TileTube renderers.
Essentia suction still needs further side-by-side parity with all original TileTube subclasses and edge cases.
Alchemy recipes and research gates for all essentia devices still need full ConfigRecipes/ConfigResearch audit.
Thaumatorium, centrifuge, advanced alchemical furnace, mirrors, reservoirs and golem essentia logistics still need their own strict parity stages.
